hints.description: This retailer specializes in beauty products, offering a wide assortment of cosmetics, skincare, hair care, and fragrances from both prestige and mass-market brands. They also provide salon services like hair styling, color, and skincare treatments within their stores, creating a unique shopping experience. The company is notable for its loyalty program, which rewards frequent shoppers with exclusive perks and discounts.
hints.funFact1: Founder Richard E. George initially started the business in 1990 as a catalog retailer called *****, focusing on discounted cosmetics before transitioning to brick-and-mortar stores.
hints.funFact2: In 2019, the company acquired Sephor*’s North American business, a move that significantly expanded its salon services offerings and strengthened its position in the beauty industry.
